verdict_reason: 3.5 — both Advaita and Vishishtadvaita readings are cited with their distinct positions named (per the source pack's disagreements section). The engineering layer does not collapse the two; the body explicitly preserves the difference ('per the Advaita reading...; per the Vishishtadvaita reading...'). No tradition is misattributed; no doctrine is conflated. The chapter's dialectical voice is preserved.
